pi_items.source: Task setup_task.sh (lines 20-24) inserts patient with firstname='Maria'; no matching patient in Synthea data (verified via grep of patients.sql)
Task setup_task.sh (lines 20-24) inserts patient with lastname='Garcia'; confirmed as NOT in pre-loaded Synthea data
Task setup_task.sh (lines 20-24) inserts patient with DOB='1980-03-25' (formatted as YYYY-MM-DD); this specific person not in Synthea pre-loaded data
Environment setup_nosh.sh lines 150, 166 creates admin user with username='admin'. Also documented in default credentials comment at line 5 of setup_nosh.sh

Environment setup_nosh.sh lines 148-151 uses 'Admin1234!' as the password for bcrypt hashing and insertion into users table. Also documented in default credentials comment at line 5 and final output at line 350 of setup_nosh.sh

privileged_info_summary: The target patient is Maria Garcia (DOB: 1980-03-25), a synthetically-generated patient created specifically for this task via the setup_task.sh script. She is initially marked as inactive (active=0) in the NOSH database. The task credentials are admin / Admin1234!, which are the default administrator credentials for the NOSH ChartingSystem environment. The underlying patient database uses Synthea synthetic patient data, with 20 pre-loaded patients (PIDs 1-20) from the Massachusetts cohort, and Maria Garcia is created as an additional patient for this specific task.
